zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：震荡整理偏强
zh.content:
当前XRP/USD维持窄幅震荡格局，价格运行在1.139附近，整体略强于20日均线支撑，短线多空博弈明显，未出现明确方向突破信号。

技术指标方面，MACD柱体维持微弱正值0.009，显示动能仍偏多但强度有限，RSI暂缺数据无法确认超买超卖，均线结构呈现价格站稳20日均线之上。

下方关键支撑位关注1.134附近的20日均线区域，其次为1.130整数关口；上方短线阻力集中在1.142及1.145一线，突破需量能配合。

交易策略建议以区间高抛低吸为主，未有效突破前不追涨，回踩1.134-1.130可分批布局多单，跌破则需严格止损控制风险操作为宜。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is currently trading around 1.13917, reflecting a marginal 24-hour decline of 0.13%. Price action remains tightly compressed between 1.13717 and 1.14232, indicating a short-term consolidation phase. The market structure suggests indecision after a minor upward attempt, with momentum flattening. Overall trend is neutral-to-slightly-bearish in the very short term as price struggles to establish a clean breakout above recent intraday highs.

Short-term indicators show a mixed but slightly constructive bias. Price is holding above the 20-period SMA at 1.13411, which acts as dynamic support. The MACD reading at 0.0091301092 suggests mild positive momentum, though lack of a signal line limits confirmation. With RSI unavailable, momentum clarity is reduced, but price stability above moving average keeps the structure cautiously bullish unless breakdown occurs below 1.134. Momentum remains sensitive to macro crypto sentiment and short-term liquidity conditions in thin trading sessions.

Immediate resistance is defined at 1.14232, where recent highs have repeatedly capped price advances. A sustained break above this level could open a move toward 1.145–1.150 range. On the downside, initial support sits at 1.13717, with stronger structural support at the 20-SMA near 1.13411. A loss of this zone may expose deeper retracement toward 1.130 psychological level in the near term.

Given the current tight range, traders may favor a range-bound strategy, buying near support at 1.13717–1.13411 and taking profits near resistance at 1.14232. Breakout traders should wait for a confirmed close above 1.14232 before targeting 1.145–1.150, with volume confirmation preferred. Risk management is critical due to low volatility, with stops placed below 1.134 to protect against downside expansion potential moves.
